name: Fullgoal Fund Management Co Ltd - Fullgoal CSI Coal And Consumable Fuels Index Fund
summary: Fullgoal Fund Management Co Ltd - Fullgoal CSI Coal And Consumable Fuels Index Fund is an index fund that tracks the performance of the CSI Coal and Consumable Fuels Index. The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to companies involved in the coal and consumable fuels industry in China. It is managed by Fullgoal Fund Management Co., Ltd.
